entry: Plant your palms shoulder width apart and lift your hips high.
Make an upside-down V with your body.
hold: Press the floor away and let your head hang.
Pedal your heels toward the mat, one at a time.
cues.exit: Lower your knees softly to the mat.

entry: Step one foot forward between your hands.
Lower your back knee to the mat and sweep your arms up.
hold: Sink your hips forward and down.
Feel the stretch along the front of your back hip.
cues.exit: Frame your front foot with your hands and step back.

entry: Step one foot forward and stay high on your back toes.
Bend your front knee over your ankle and reach your arms up.
hold: Press back through your back heel.
Square your hips toward the front of your mat.
cues.exit: Lower your hands and step back to your fold or plank.

entry: Open your hips and shoulders to the side of your mat.
Extend your arms long, front and back.
hold: Stack your front knee over your ankle.
Gaze softly over your front fingertips.
cues.exit: Straighten your front leg and windmill your hands down.

entry: From Warrior Two, bring your front forearm to your thigh.
Reach your top arm over your ear.
hold: Make one long line from your back heel to your fingertips.
Roll your chest open toward the ceiling.
cues.exit: Press into your feet and rise back to Warrior Two.

entry: Shift your weight into one foot.
Place your other foot on your ankle, calf, or inner thigh — never the knee.
hold: Press your foot and leg into each other.
Find one still point to rest your gaze.
cues.exit: Slowly lower your foot back to the mat.

entry: Catch the inside of one ankle behind you.
Reach your other arm forward for balance.
hold: Kick your foot into your hand and let your chest lift.
Keep your standing leg strong.
cues.exit: Release your ankle gently and return to standing.

entry: Lie on your belly with palms under your shoulders.
Press gently to peel your chest off the mat.
hold: Keep your elbows hugging your ribs.
Lengthen through the back of your neck.
cues.exit: Lower down slowly, one rib at a time.

entry: Press through your palms and straighten your arms.
Lift your chest and your thighs off the mat.
hold: Roll your shoulders back and open your collarbones.
Press the tops of your feet down.
cues.exit: Roll over your toes or lower down to your belly.

entry: Bend your knees and catch the outside of your ankles.
Kick your feet back to lift your chest and thighs.
hold: Keep your knees hip width apart.
Balance on the soft part of your belly and breathe.
cues.exit: Release your ankles gently and lower down.

entry: Bring your big toes together and knees wide.
Sink your hips back to your heels and reach your arms forward.
hold: Rest your forehead on the mat.
Let each exhale soften your back a little more.
cues.exit: Walk your hands in and rise up slowly.

entry: Bring the soles of your feet together.
Let your knees fall open like book pages.
hold: Hold your feet and sit tall, or fold forward.
Let gravity do the work on your inner thighs.
cues.exit: Support your knees with your hands as you bring them together.

entry: Bring one shin forward and lay it across the mat.
Extend your back leg long behind you.
hold: Square your hips and fold over your front shin.
Breathe into the deep stretch in your outer hip.
cues.exit: Press into your hands and step your front leg back.

entry: Balance on your sit bones and lift your shins parallel to the floor.
Reach your arms forward alongside your knees.
hold: Lift through your chest — don't let your back round.
Straighten your legs for more challenge, or hold behind your thighs for less.
cues.exit: Lower your feet down with control.

entry: Kneel with your hips over your knees, hands on your low back.
Lift your chest and arch back; reach for your heels if it's there today.
hold: Keep pressing your hips forward over your knees.
Let your chest lead the backbend, not your neck.
cues.exit: Bring your hands to your low back and rise up slowly.

entry: Kneel and sit between your heels, or on a block.
Rest your hands on your thighs.
hold: Grow tall through your spine.
Let your breath settle into an easy rhythm.
cues.exit: Come forward to hands and knees and stretch your legs out.

entry: Stand with your big toes touching and your heels slightly apart.
Spread your weight evenly across all four corners of each foot.
hold: Reach the crown of your head toward the ceiling and soften your shoulders down.
Draw your lower belly gently in so your low back stays long.
cues.exit: Soften your knees and move into your next shape.

entry: Come to hands and knees with your wrists under your shoulders and knees under your hips.
Start with a long, neutral spine.
hold: Inhale to drop your belly and lift your chest and tailbone for cow.
Exhale to round your spine toward the ceiling and tuck your chin for cat.
Let each breath drive one full wave of the movement.
cues.exit: Return to a neutral spine on hands and knees.

entry: From hands and knees, slide one arm under your chest with the palm facing up.
Lower that shoulder and ear softly to the mat.
hold: Keep your hips stacked over your knees.
Press lightly through your top hand to deepen the twist across your upper back.
cues.exit: Press into your supporting hand and unwind back to hands and knees.

entry: From standing, hinge at your hips and fold your chest toward your thighs.
Bend your knees as much as you need to keep your back long.
hold: Let your head and neck hang completely heavy.
Shift your weight slightly forward toward the balls of your feet.
cues.exit: Roll up to standing slowly, one vertebra at a time.

entry: Sit tall with your legs extended and flex your feet toward you.
Hinge from your hips and walk your hands down your legs.
hold: Lead with your chest instead of your forehead to keep your spine long.
Soften your knees if the backs of your legs feel sharp.
cues.exit: Inhale and roll your spine back up to sitting.

entry: Step your feet wide with your toes pointing straight ahead.
Hinge at your hips and bring your hands to the mat beneath your shoulders.
hold: Press evenly through the outer edges of your feet.
Let the crown of your head release toward the floor.
cues.exit: Bring your hands to your hips and rise with a flat back.

entry: From a wide stance, turn your front toes forward and reach long over your front leg.
Lower your bottom hand to your shin or a block and stretch your top arm to the ceiling.
hold: Keep both legs straight without locking your knees.
Imagine your whole body pressed between two panes of glass.
cues.exit: Press into your feet and lift your torso back upright.

entry: Lie on your back and draw your knees toward your armpits.
Hold the outer edges of your feet with your soles facing the ceiling.
hold: Draw your knees down while pressing your tailbone toward the mat.
Rock gently side to side if that feels good on your low back.
cues.exit: Release your feet and hug your knees into your chest.

entry: Lie on your back with your knees bent and heels close to your hips.
Press through your feet to lift your hips toward the ceiling.
hold: Keep your knees tracking over your ankles instead of splaying wide.
Roll your shoulders beneath you and let your chest open.
cues.exit: Lower your spine to the mat one vertebra at a time.

entry: Sit tall and step one foot outside your opposite thigh.
Hug that knee with the opposite arm and plant your other hand behind you.
hold: Inhale to grow taller, exhale to rotate a little further.
Turn from your ribs first and let your gaze follow last.
cues.exit: Unwind slowly back to center on an exhale.

entry: Lie on your back and hug one knee into your chest.
Guide that knee across your body toward the opposite side of the mat.
hold: Keep both shoulders resting heavy on the floor.
Turn your gaze away from your knee if your neck allows.
cues.exit: Draw your knee back to center and stretch your leg long.

entry: From hands and knees, step your feet back until your body forms one straight line.
Stack your shoulders directly over your wrists.
hold: Press the floor away and knit your ribs toward your hips.
Squeeze your thighs and reach back through your heels.
cues.exit: Lower your knees to the mat with control.

entry: Sit with one hip against a wall, then swing your legs up as you lie back.
Scoot your sit bones close to the wall and rest your arms by your sides.
hold: Let the wall hold the full weight of your legs.
Soften your jaw, your throat, and the space between your eyebrows.
cues.exit: Bend your knees, roll to one side, and press up slowly.

entry: Lie on your back with your legs long and your feet falling open.
Rest your arms a little away from your body, palms facing up.
hold: Release the weight of your body completely into the mat.
Let your breath return to its natural rhythm, with nothing left to do.
cues.exit: Wiggle your fingers and toes, roll to one side, and rise gently.
